step1.title: Welcome!
step1.body: Follow your league, check results and compete with your friends. Here's a quick look at the basics.

step2.title: Pick your league and round
step2.body: Use the button at the top to switch league and round so you see exactly what you care about.

step3.title: Explore the sections
step3.body: Switch between Standings, Fixtures, Statistics, Versus and Team of the Week using the tabs.

step4.title: Transfers, up to date
step4.body: The new Transfers tab shows the league's latest moves: who's arriving, from which club and for how much.

step5.title: Survivor mode
step5.body: Pick a team every round and survive. You can only choose one team per round — stay alive as long as you keep getting it right.

step6.title: Your profile and pools
step6.body: Use the bottom bar to move around the app and open your profile. In Pools you compete by predicting results.

step1.title: Your pool
step1.body: Here you predict match scores and compete for first place against the rest of the participants.

step2.title: Info, Predictions and Standings
step2.body: Use the top tabs to switch between the pool's info, your predictions and the group standings.

step3.title: Make your predictions
step3.body: In Predictions, adjust each match score with the + and − buttons. It saves automatically.

step4.title: Compete and invite
step4.body: Check your position in the Standings and share the access code to invite your friends.

replay.title: Tutorial
replay.subtitle: Watch the usage guide again
replay.label: Guided tour
replay.description: Review how to use the home and pools
replay.toast: We'll show you the guide again
